allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const u = process.env.DATABASE_URL; const m = u.match\(/@\([^/]+\)\\//\); console.log\('host:', m ? m[1] : 'PARSE_FAIL'\); console.log\('has pooler:', u.includes\('pooler'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const u = process.env.DATABASE_URL || ''; console.log\('length:', u.length\); console.log\('starts with postgresql://:', u.startsWith\('postgresql://'\)\); console.log\('has @:', u.includes\('@'\)\); console.log\('first 30 chars:', JSON.stringify\(u.slice\(0, 30\)\)\); console.log\('last 30 chars:', JSON.stringify\(u.slice\(-30\)\)\); console.log\('has newline:', /[\\r\\n]/.test\(u\)\);")
Bash(node -e "import\('@neondatabase/serverless'\).then\(m => { const s = m.neon\('postgresql://x:x@x/x'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(s\)\); console.log\(typeof s\); }\)")
PowerShell(Get-DnsClientServerAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.ServerAddresses.Count -gt 0 } | Select-Object InterfaceAlias,ServerAddresses | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(try { Set-DnsClientServerAddress -InterfaceAlias "Wi-Fi" -ServerAddresses \("1.1.1.1","1.0.0.1"\) -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "DNS updated on Wi-Fi"; ipconfig /flushdns | Out-Null; Write-Output "DNS cache flushed" } catch { Write-Output "FAILED - need admin: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
